PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?athlete ?athleteLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P159 wd:Q295193 .
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q3252508 .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "men's singles") && CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "figure skating"))
  .
  ?event p:P1546 ?medalStatement .
  ?medalStatement ps:P1546 ?medal .
  ?medalStatement pq:P1313 wd:Q286723 .
  ?medalStatement pq:P1427 ?athlete .
  ?athlete rdfs:label ?athleteLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?athleteLabel) = "en")
}
